Event: Magic Well - September 2025
Event Date: 08/09/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: AM240


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Explorer Chest
Crystal Magic Amulet

Once in a while casts improved restoration on an allied unit with the lowest current health. It removes 3 random negative effects from them, and they recover 25% health. It also increases their stats by 30% for 4 sec.

When any unit on the battlefield dies, the amulet owner casts improved restoration on themselves and a random allied unit. It removes 3 random negative effects from them, and they recover 25% health. It also increases their stats by 30% for 4 sec. Can be triggered only once in 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: 🌝🌝🌝🌝🌚

Event: Magic Well - September 2025

Event date: 08/09/2025

Sage bot code: AM240

First trigger: 5 sec

Cooldown: 8 secs
